meaning: adj.好奇的,求知的,古怪的,爱挑剔的
examples: "I'm not meddling," Ken said mildly, "I'm just curious."
Steve was intensely curious about the world I came from.
They entered the shop, which was a curious ramshackle building.
But for those curious about her life and times, it is every bit as fascinating.
Mr. DAVE BURT (Listener): I'm just curious to know how this problem could have gotten so big.
